name: Dwarf remains
rationale: Pure quest item used only in Dwarf Cannon, with no skill or combat function. A player would only look for it in the quests tab.

name: Toolkit
rationale: Quest item used only in Dwarf Cannon to repair the broken cannon during the quest. No ongoing skill use, so quests only.

name: Steel cannonball
rationale: Cannon ammunition cast from steel bars via Smithing, fired from the dwarf multicannon during ranged combat and used as a slayer-task accelerator. Per the cannon rule it belongs in Mining + Smithing, range, and slayer.

name: Nulodion's notes
rationale: Quest item used only in Dwarf Cannon. The examine text mentions construction of cannon ammo, but it is not a Construction-skill item, so it stays in quests only.

name: Ammo mould
rationale: The reusable tool that casts steel bars into cannonballs, which is a Smithing activity, so it belongs in Mining + Smithing. Dropped the quests tag because it is a permanent skilling tool kept for its function rather than a quest keepsake.

name: Instruction manual
rationale: The dwarf multicannon reference book. It has no skill or combat function and is not a deployable cannon part, so it stays in misc rather than the cannon tabs.

name: Cannon base
rationale: A deployable dwarf multicannon part. Per the cannon rule it goes in range and slayer. Dropped quests because the part is a functional combat tool, not a quest keepsake, even though the quest gates its use.

name: Cannon stand
rationale: A deployable dwarf multicannon part, so range and slayer per the cannon rule. Dropped misc and quests, which were noise; added range.

name: Cannon barrels
rationale: A deployable dwarf multicannon part that fires the cannonballs, so range and slayer per the cannon rule. Dropped misc and quests as noise.

name: Cannon furnace
rationale: The final deployable dwarf multicannon part, so range and slayer per the cannon rule. Dropped misc and quests as noise.

name: Railing
rationale: Quest item used only in Dwarf Cannon to repair a fence. No ongoing skill or combat use, so quests only.

name: Holy table napkin
rationale: Quest item used only in Holy Grail to reveal the magic whistle spawn. No ongoing use, so quests only.

name: Magic whistle
rationale: Quest item used only in Holy Grail. No ongoing use, so quests only.

name: Grail bell
rationale: Quest item used only in Holy Grail to enter the Fisher Realm castle. No ongoing use, so quests only.

name: Magic gold feather
rationale: Quest item used only in Holy Grail to locate Sir Percival. No ongoing use, so quests only.

name: Holy grail
rationale: Quest item used in Holy Grail and King's Ransom. No skill or combat use, so quests only.

name: White cog
rationale: Quest item used only in Clock Tower. No ongoing use, so quests only.

name: Black cog
rationale: Quest item used only in Clock Tower. No ongoing use, so quests only.

name: Blue cog
rationale: Quest item used only in Clock Tower. No ongoing use, so quests only.

name: Red cog
rationale: Quest item used only in Clock Tower. No ongoing use, so quests only.

name: Rat poison
rationale: Quest item used in Clock Tower and Ratcatchers. No general skill use, so quests only.

name: Red vine worm
rationale: Quest-only bait used to catch the giant carp in Fishing Contest, with no role in normal Fishing training. Removed the fishing tag because a player training Fishing would not look for it there.

name: Fishing trophy
rationale: Quest reward from Fishing Contest with no ongoing use, so quests only.

name: Fishing pass
rationale: Quest item used only to enter the Fishing Contest. No ongoing use, so quests only.

name: Insect repellent
rationale: Consumable used in quest steps such as collecting beehive wax. No general skill use, so quests.

name: Bucket of wax
rationale: Quest item used in Merlin's Crystal and Troll Romance. No ongoing use, so quests only.

name: Lit candle
rationale: A discontinued, unobtainable variant of the candle with no function. It fits no skill tab, so misc.

name: Excalibur
rationale: An equippable one-handed slash sword requiring 20 Attack, comparable to an adamant longsword. Classified by function as a melee weapon; dropped quests per the quest-tool policy since it has enduring combat use.

name: Candle
rationale: A basic light source lit with a tinderbox. Kept in firemaking as the natural home for tinderbox-lit light sources.

name: Black candle
rationale: The quest-specific candle used only in Merlin's Crystal, with no use outside that quest, so quests only.

name: Bronze arrowtips
rationale: Smithed from a bronze bar, but its only further step is fletching it onto arrows. Under the inputs-only rule it belongs in Woodcutting + Firemaking / Fletching, the consuming skill, not Mining + Smithing and not range.

name: Iron arrowtips
rationale: Smithed from an iron bar, but its only further step is fletching it onto arrows. Under the inputs-only rule it belongs in Woodcutting + Firemaking / Fletching, the consuming skill, not Mining + Smithing and not range.

name: Steel arrowtips
rationale: Smithed from a steel bar, but its only further step is fletching it onto arrows. Under the inputs-only rule it belongs in Woodcutting + Firemaking / Fletching, the consuming skill, not Mining + Smithing and not range.

name: Mithril arrowtips
rationale: Smithed from a mithril bar, but its only further step is fletching it onto arrows. Under the inputs-only rule it belongs in Woodcutting + Firemaking / Fletching, the consuming skill, not Mining + Smithing and not range.

name: Adamant arrowtips
rationale: Smithed from an adamant bar, but its only further step is fletching it onto arrows. Under the inputs-only rule it belongs in Woodcutting + Firemaking / Fletching, the consuming skill, not Mining + Smithing and not range.

name: Rune arrowtips
rationale: Smithed from a runite bar, but its only further step is fletching it onto arrows. Under the inputs-only rule it belongs in Woodcutting + Firemaking / Fletching, the consuming skill, not Mining + Smithing and not range.

name: Opal bolt tips
rationale: Cut from an opal with a chisel as a Fletching material for bolts. An intermediate component, not usable ammunition, so Woodcutting + Firemaking / Fletching only and not range.

name: Pearl bolt tips
rationale: Cut from oyster pearls with a chisel as a Fletching material for bolts. An intermediate component, not usable ammunition, so Woodcutting + Firemaking / Fletching only and not range.

name: Barb bolttips
rationale: A Fletching material attached to bronze bolts to make barbed bolts. An intermediate component, not usable ammunition, so Woodcutting + Firemaking / Fletching only and not range.

name: Longbow (u)
rationale: An unstrung bow, a Fletching product that cannot be wielded until strung. Belongs in Woodcutting + Firemaking / Fletching only.

name: Shortbow (u)
rationale: An unstrung bow, a Fletching product that cannot be wielded until strung. Belongs in Woodcutting + Firemaking / Fletching only.

name: Arrow shaft
rationale: A basic Fletching material cut from logs. Woodcutting + Firemaking / Fletching only.

name: Headless arrow
rationale: A Fletching intermediate made from shafts and feathers, before arrowtips are attached. Woodcutting + Firemaking / Fletching only.

name: Oak shortbow (u)
rationale: An unstrung bow, a Fletching product not wieldable until strung, so Woodcutting + Firemaking / Fletching only. Removed range.

name: Oak longbow (u)
rationale: An unstrung bow, a Fletching product not wieldable until strung, so Woodcutting + Firemaking / Fletching only. Removed range.

name: Willow longbow (u)
rationale: An unstrung bow, a Fletching product not wieldable until strung, so Woodcutting + Firemaking / Fletching only. Removed range.

name: Willow shortbow (u)
rationale: An unstrung bow, a Fletching product not wieldable until strung, so Woodcutting + Firemaking / Fletching only. Removed range.

name: Maple longbow (u)
rationale: An unstrung bow, a Fletching product not wieldable until strung, so Woodcutting + Firemaking / Fletching only. Removed range.

name: Maple shortbow (u)
rationale: An unstrung bow, a Fletching product not wieldable until strung, so Woodcutting + Firemaking / Fletching only. Removed range.

name: Yew longbow (u)
rationale: An unstrung bow, a Fletching product not wieldable until strung, so Woodcutting + Firemaking / Fletching only. Removed range.
